texto: You didn't happen to install Windows when you upgraded me, did you?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kelly McCullough que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “You didn't happen to install Windows when you upgraded me, did you?”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, computers, humorous-quotes, com foco em humorous-quotes.

frase_original: You didn't happen to install Windows when you upgraded me, did you?

texto: I may not have any power over it at the moment, but at some point that must change. I can be very patient. I am the end of all things, nephew mine. I shall be the last. When birth has ended, I wil cut Clotho's cord, and she will be no more. The time will come when every last thread has been measured, and I will snip Lachesis from the great weave. In the end only Death and I will remain. Then I will cut his thread, and it will be me alone. With my last strength I will close the shears on my own life. I am the end of everything, including you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kelly McCullough sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I may not have any power over it at the moment, but at some point that must change. I can be very…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, death, end, útil em momentos de luto e mudanca.
